policies.searchText:
enable test feature this policy setting allows you to enable or disable the test feature.

if you enable this policy setting, the test feature will be activated.

if you disable this policy setting, the test feature will be deactivated.

if you do not configure this policy setting, the default behavior applies. test application settings software\policies\testcompany\testapp enablefeature enabletestfeature windows 10 and later
policies.name: EnableTestFeature
policies.explainText:
This policy setting allows you to enable or disable the test feature.

If you enable this policy setting, the test feature will be activated.

If you disable this policy setting, the test feature will be deactivated.

If you do not configure this policy setting, the default behavior applies.

policies.searchText:
configure security level this policy setting allows you to configure the security level for the application.

select the desired security level from the dropdown menu:
- low: minimal security checks
- medium: standard security checks (recommended)
- high: maximum security with additional validation

if you do not configure this policy setting, medium security level is used by default. test application settings security settings software\policies\testcompany\security securitylevel all windows versions securityleveldropdown level low - minimal security medium - standard security (recommended) high - maximum security
policies.name: SecurityLevel
policies.explainText:
This policy setting allows you to configure the security level for the application.

Select the desired security level from the dropdown menu:
- Low: Minimal security checks
- Medium: Standard security checks (recommended)
- High: Maximum security with additional validation

If you do not configure this policy setting, Medium security level is used by default.

policies.searchText:
configure network settings this policy setting allows you to configure network proxy settings for the application.

enter the proxy server address and port number. enable "use proxy" to activate the proxy configuration.

if you do not configure this policy setting, direct connection is used. test application settings network configuration software\policies\testcompany\network networksettings windows 10 and later proxyport proxyport useproxy useproxy proxyserver proxyaddress
policies.name: NetworkSettings
policies.explainText:
This policy setting allows you to configure network proxy settings for the application.

Enter the proxy server address and port number. Enable "Use Proxy" to activate the proxy configuration.

If you do not configure this policy setting, direct connection is used.

policies.searchText:
allowed applications list this policy setting allows you to specify a list of applications that are allowed to run.

add the full path or name of each allowed application to the list.

if you enable this policy setting, only applications in the list will be permitted.

if you disable or do not configure this policy setting, all applications are allowed. test application settings security settings software\policies\testcompany\appcontrol allowedapplications all windows versions allowedappslist
policies.name: AllowedApplications
policies.explainText:
This policy setting allows you to specify a list of applications that are allowed to run.

Add the full path or name of each allowed application to the list.

If you enable this policy setting, only applications in the list will be permitted.

If you disable or do not configure this policy setting, all applications are allowed.
